article_title: Less is More：当精简的 Harness 在基准测试中击败了功能完备的对手
core_theme: Pi harness 的信息精简设计哲学——4 个工具、170 行 system prompt、激进截断——在 Databricks 基准测试中以 1/3 上下文达成与 Claude Code 相同的任务完成率
reader_takeaway: 理解为什么在 Transformer 架构下，更少的信息反而能带来更好的模型决策质量，以及 harness 设计的本质是信息架构问题
summary_angle: Less is More：左半边代表「信息堆砌」（杂乱、拥挤、40+ 工具），右半边代表「信息精简」（清晰、聚焦、4 个核心工具），中间是一道 bold 对比线

information_blocks.source_anchor: 两种设计哲学：Claude Code 信息最大化 vs Pi 信息精简
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧拥挤的工具箱/文档堆，右侧精简的 4 个干净工具图标
information_blocks.visible_label: 信息堆砌 vs 信息精简

information_blocks.source_anchor: Databricks 基准测试数据：Pi 上下文为 Claude Code 的约 1/3，任务完成率持平
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个对比条形图概念：左栏高 token 数、右栏低 token 数，但结果标记相同

information_blocks.source_anchor: Transformer 注意力稀释：上下文膨胀导致关键信息被淹没
information_blocks.visual_idea: 密集信号点中只有一个被高亮标注，其余淡化

main_metaphor: RISC vs CISC——左侧复杂庞大的指令集，右侧精简高效的指令集，中间用黑白高对比分割
primary_subject: 一分为二的画面，左侧堆积着大量文档、工具图标、规则文本（代表信息最大化），右侧只有 4 个干净的工具符号和一条简短指令（代表信息精简）
subject_action: 左右形成强烈的视觉对比——密集 vs 空旷、复杂 vs 简洁
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: black-and-white printmaking look, carved textures, bold shadows, high contrast, poster-like but no title text
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从 40 项风格池随机选中；黑白版画的高对比、极简色彩适合表达「Less is More」的核心理念，bold shadows 可强化左右对照的视觉张力
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
allowed_visible_text: 信息堆砌 vs 信息精简
avoid: 彩色元素（保持严格黑白灰）
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证左右对照构图是否成立，黑白版画的高对比纹理是否到位，三个信息块是否在黑白限制下仍然可辨识
revision_targets: 左右对比不够强烈，画面显得均匀而非对峙
黑白色调中出现不必要的彩色元素
信息块标签在黑白背景下不够清晰
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: The design philosophy of minimal AI coding agent harness — Pi uses 4 tools, 170-line system prompt, aggressive truncation, and achieves the same task completion rate as Claude Code with only 1/3 the context tokens. The reader should quickly feel this is about the counterintuitive power of simplicity and minimalism in AI tool design.

Summary angle: Less is More — a bold visual contrast between information overload (left) and information minimalism (right), separated by a sharp dividing line. The left side is cluttered with tools, documents, and rules; the right side is clean with only 4 essential tools and one short instruction.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal contrast and 2-3 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- contrast: Claude Code maximalism vs Pi minimalism — two competing design philosophies → visual: left side cluttered toolbox/document pile, right side 4 clean tool icons → visible label: 信息堆砌 vs 信息精简, numeric: ①
- evidence: Databricks benchmark — Pi uses ~1/3 context, equal task completion → visual: conceptual bar comparison with tall token count left, short right, same checkmark both sides → visible label: 1/3 上下文, numeric: ②
- mechanism: Transformer attention dilution — too much context drowns key signals → visual: one highlighted signal point among many dimmed ones → visible label: 注意力稀释, numeric: ③

Main metaphor: RISC vs CISC instruction set architecture — complex bloated instruction set on the left, lean efficient one on the right, divided by a bold high-contrast line.
Subject: A split-frame composition — left half densely packed with documents, tool icons, rule texts (information maximalism), right half sparse with only 4 clean tool symbols and one short instruction line (information minimalism).
Composition/framing: left-right contrast split. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: black-and-white printmaking look, carved textures, bold shadows, high contrast, poster-like but no title text. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: black, white, dark grey ONLY. No other colors.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short Chinese labels: 信息堆砌 vs 信息精简, 1/3 上下文, 注意力稀释, each with ①②③. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes.
Constraints: strictly black and white and grey palette. No color. No watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, meaningless code rain, neon city backgrounds, generic robot poses, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, massive HUD overlays, fake UI labels, fake dashboards, fake terminal output, any color elements.
